security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; media-src 'self' blob: data: asset: http://asset.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
